name: Shenglan Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenglan Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells electronic connectors and precision components. The company offers Type-C series, USB connector, FFC/FPC, connector assembly, WAFER connector, and wiring harness products; new energy products; and TV lens. Its products are used in the consumer electronics, new energy vehicles, and other fields. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Dongguan, China.
